---
title: ""
format: html
page-layout: full
---

<div class="photo-intro">
  <h1>My Photography Portfolio</h1>
  <p>If you can't tell, I am a nature lover</p>
</div>

<div class="photo-mosaic">

  <div class="photo-item tall"><img src="images/Connor-02.jpeg" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)"></div>
  <div class="photo-item wide"><img src="images/100_0407.JPG" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)"></div>
  <div class="photo-item wide"><img src="images/IMG_0471.JPG" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)"></div>
  <div class="photo-item tall"><img src="images/IMG_1756.jpeg" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)"></div>
  <div class="photo-item tall"><img src="images/IMG_1799.jpeg" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)"></div>
  <div class="photo-item wide"><img src="images/IMG_2359.jpeg" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)"></div>
  <div class="photo-item tall"><img src="images/IMG_2518.jpeg" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)"></div>
  <div class="photo-item wide"><img src="images/IMG_2703.jpeg" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)"></div>
  <div class="photo-item tall"><img src="images/IMG_2886.jpeg" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)"></div>
  <div class="photo-item wide"><img src="images/IMG_7651.JPG" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)"></div>

</div>

<div id="image-lightbox" onclick="closeLightbox()">
  <img id="lightbox-img">
</div>

<script>
function openLightbox(src) {
  document.getElementById("lightbox-img").src = src;
  document.getElementById("image-lightbox").style.display = "flex";
}

function closeLightbox() {
  document.getElementById("image-lightbox").style.display = "none";
}
</script>
